steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The phrase “by promoting the works of...” shows how the organization acts on its commitment. The blank must name an action that connects commitment to this concrete behavior.

steps.title: Find the word that fits
steps.content:
The target meaning is to demonstrate or to put into practice. “Shows” does this—showing commitment means proving it through action, exactly what the organization does by promoting indigenous photographers' work.

The other choices mean ending, explaining, or coming before in time, not demonstrating commitment.

This matches choice D — D is correct.
